levelList.name: 血液轟撃
levelList.desc:
[WhenUse] 若主要<color=#ffffff>目標</color>帯有負面状態，則使本技能的<color=#ffffff>拼点威力</color>+10
- 若主要<color=#ffffff>目標</color>未帯有負面状態，則改為<color=#ffffff>拼点威力</color>-10

coindescs.desc: 若<color=#ffffff>目標</color>帯有負面状態，則使本硬幣造成的<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>+50%
[OnSucceedAttack] 触発<color=#ffffff>目標</color>的[Laceration]1次并使其[Laceration]層数減少1層

levelList.name: 血液凝結
levelList.desc:
[WhenUse] 若主要<color=#ffffff>目標</color>帯有負面状態，則使本技能的<color=#ffffff>拼点威力</color>+10
- 若主要<color=#ffffff>目標</color>未帯有負面状態，則改為<color=#ffffff>拼点威力</color>-10

coindescs.desc: 若<color=#ffffff>目標</color>帯有負面状態，則使本硬幣造成的<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>+100%
[OnSucceedAttack] 触発<color=#ffffff>目標</color>的[Laceration]3次并使其[Laceration]層数減少3層
